rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE RAYMOND T. FONG & MILDRED FONG REVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Respondent'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents, Etc.
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Friday, February 15, 2008 at 9:00 a.m. 1) Respondent's motion to compel further responses to requests for production of documents and special interrogatories request for production of documents 1-36, 39-83 Granted. The objections are overruled and stricken. If any documents are withheld pursuant to a claim of privilege, they shall be identified with particularity in a privilege log 37, 38, 84 Denied special interrogatories 1, 3, 4, 5, 12, 14, 15, 16 Granted form interrogatories 17.1 with the exception of the interrogatory regarding request #6, the motion is granted. = (610/BEC)

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE RAYMOND T. FONG & MILDRED FONG REVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Friday, February 15, 2008 at 9:00 a.m. 2) Respondent's motion to compel further responses to form interrogatories Granted. Further responses shall be served within 14 days of notice of this order. The request for monetary sanctions is denied. = (610/BEC)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Order Awarding Attorney'S Fees
rulings.Rulings: Defendant's motion for order awarding attorneys fees is set for 2/15/08 at 9 am in Dept. 204. Tentative ruling: Deny
